business.name: Rooftop Relief
business.tagline: When storms hit, we fix what breaks

hero.headline: When Cincinnati storms hit, *we fix what breaks*
hero.subheadline: Ryan and Josh handle everything from quick patches to full replacements — honest pricing, no surprises.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every roof problem, handled
services_section.subheading: Storm damage to full replacements — we show up ready to work

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Fast response when weather hits your roof. Emergency patches to full storm restoration.

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.description: Complete tear-off and replacement. Quality materials, proper installation, clean jobsite.

services.title: Leak Repair
services.description: Find the source, fix it right. No more buckets or tarps — just a roof that works.

services.title: Roof Inspection
services.description: Thorough assessment of your roof's condition. Honest evaluation of what needs attention.

about.heading: Ryan and Josh run the show
about.body: We're the Cincinnati roofing team that shows up when we say we will. Real people answering the phone, honest assessments, and work that lasts.

reviews.name: Sydney R.
reviews.text: Incredibly honest and helpful. They made quick fixes at no charge and told us we didn't need major work. So refreshing to find contractors like this.

reviews.name: Ryan M.
reviews.text: Amazing customer service that goes above and beyond. Their attention to detail and politeness was great from start to finish.

reviews.name: Alison B.
reviews.text: Great experience. Crew arrived on time, completed thorough inspection, and handled storm damage repair quickly and professionally.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Cincinnati and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local team covering the tri-state region

cta.heading: Ready to fix your roof?
cta.body: Free estimates, honest pricing, and work that lasts. Call now or request your estimate online.
